operations.exit_load: Exit load for units in excess of 15% of the investment, exit load of 3% if redeemed within 1 year, 2% if redeemed after 1 year but within 2 years, 1% if redeemed after 2 years but within 3 years.
operations.taxation: Returns are taxed as per your Income Tax slab.

fund_manager.name: Mohit Sharma
fund_manager.experience_summary: Prior to joining Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC, he ran his own healthcare-tech business (June 2012 - May 2015). he has also worked as an Interest Rates Trader in Standard Chartered Bank (May 2007 - June 2011) and ICICI Bank Ltd (June 2006 - April 2007). He started his career in the Equity Research in Irevna Ltd (June 2005 - June 2006).
